home_about:
HQM Localizer is a Streamlit web app for translating Hardcore Questing Mode 1.7.10 `quests.hqm` files.

This project is a fork of https://github.com/peunsu/mc-questing-mod-localizer, specialized for HQM’s legacy format.
home_desc_1: OpenAI GPT is a large language model that provides high-quality translations. You can get a free OpenAI API key from [here](https://platform.openai.com/signup) and translate your quest files with it.
home_desc_2: The Translation Fixer is designed to address translation issues in language files, such as missing or incorrect translations. By uploading a language file and selecting the text you want to fix, the selected text will be re-translated using translation services. If you encounter errors while using the localizer and some text is not translated correctly, you can use this tool.
deepl_key_help: To get your API key, visit [DeepL API](https://www.deepl.com/pro-api) and sign up for a DeepL account. (free tier available)
gemini_key_help: To get your API key, visit [Gemini API](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs) and sign up for a Gemini account. (free tier available)
openai_key_help: To get your API key, visit [OpenAI API](https://platform.openai.com/signup) and sign up for an OpenAI account.
api_key_caption: Your API key is not stored anywhere and is only used for translation. **Do not share your API key with others.**
api_key_empty: Please enter your API key in the sidebar to proceed.
api_key_invalid: The API key is invalid or has reached its limit.
lexicon_wrap_readme:
### Read Me - This tool inserts wrap separators into lexicon-style `.lang` entries that do not wrap Japanese text naturally. - It is intended for entries such as Aura-Cascade `aura.page.*` and Botania `botania.page.*`. - The recommended separator is a normal space, because some mods treat `
` like a paragraph break and add an extra blank line.
lexicon_wrap_upload_label: Upload a `.lang` file to rewrite lexicon page entries.
lexicon_wrap_preset_label: Select which lexicon entries to rewrite.
lexicon_wrap_separator_label: Select the separator to insert at wrap points.
lexicon_wrap_ascii_width_label: Visible width of one ASCII character
hqm_readme:
### Read Me

- This project is specialized for Hardcore Questing Mode 1.7.10 `quests.hqm` files.

- Always keep a **backup** of the original `quests.hqm` before applying changes.

- This tool writes translations directly into the `.hqm` file and does not use external language files.

- Quest and task names have strict byte limits; long translations may be truncated.
hqm_encoding_warning: To prevent character corruption (mojibake) when loading quest files in Minecraft, ensure that `-Dfile.encoding=UTF-8` is added to your JVM arguments.
translation_fixer_readme:
### Read Me

- This tool is designed to address translation issues in language files, such as missing or incorrect translations.

- By uploading a language file and selecting the text you want to fix, the selected text will be re-translated using translation services.
modpack_name_label: Enter the shortened name of the modpack. [Example: All the Mods 9 → atm9]
select_task_label: What do you want to do?
select_task_convert_translate: **Convert** quest files to generate language files and **translate it**.
select_task_convert_no_translate: **Convert** quest files to generate language files but **do not translate it**.
hqm_task_convert_translate: **Extract** text from `quests.hqm`, **translate it**, and generate a translated `quests.hqm`.
hqm_task_extract_only: **Extract only** text from `quests.hqm` and generate a JSON file.
hqm_task_apply_translation: **Apply** an existing translated JSON file to `quests.hqm`.
upload_quest_multiple_warning: You have uploaded multiple quest files. Please make sure to only upload one quest file.
upload_lang_label_hqm: Upload a translated JSON file generated by this tool.
select_source_lang_label: Select the language of the quests you uploaded.
select_target_lang_label: Select the language you want to translate the quests into.
select_same_lang: The source language and the target language are the same.
status_step_2: **Step 2.** Translating quests... (It may take a long time - **Do not exit the page!**)
hqm_truncation_warning: {count} entries were shortened to fit HQM byte limits.
hqm_user_guide_extract:
* Download the source JSON file.

* Translate or edit it, then run this tool again with the apply option.
hqm_user_guide_apply:
* Download `quests.hqm`.

* Replace the original HQM `quests.hqm` with the downloaded file. Keep a backup of the original file.
